Task: **Focus Area:** The Letter Hunt & Shape Sorting Safari!
*Note: Parents can update this section weekly to log activities (e.g., "Read 3 books", "Practiced tracing the letter G", "Sorted blocks by color").*
Chess: 1 short puzzle or mini game (5x/week)
**Monday**: Phonics - Hide 5 physical letters around the living room. Have Glory hunt for them and make their sound when found!
**Tuesday**: Math - Trace 3 big shapes (Circle, Square, Triangle) on paper. Have Glory sort her toys into the matching shapes.
**Wednesday**: Motor Skills - Practice using safety scissors to cut along a thick, straight line.
**Thursday**: Arts  - Finger painting! Focus on mixing two primary colors to make a secondary color.
**Friday**: Social - Practice taking turns building a block tower with Caleb or Elijah.
